gist.headline: Prompt to project
gist.blurb: AiApps just landed in the greenhouse! Generate entire projects in your browser from a few prompts, tweak them in a virtual workspace, and download the files when you're done.
gist.summary: Added AiApps to the community showcase, a browser-based tool that generates complete project workspaces from simple prompts using pollinations.ai.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use AiApps to quickly bootstrap, edit, and download code projects directly in their browser.
gist.visual_concept: A greenhouse setting representing the community app showcase. The bee (Polly) and the Monitor Robot (representing the browser/workspace) building a tiny project together, with code-plants growing around them.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hardhat, working alongside a chunky monitor-head robot to build a glowing digital workspace inside a glass greenhouse. Code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
